creator: theraven@FreeBSD.org
text: Does this affect users, or is it part of the FreeBSD build?  We have a number of problems because the base system build uses `-Wsystem-headers` and so clang reports a lot of things that it shouldn't, because it treats the system headers as if they aren't system headers.  If this is only a problem for the FreeBSD build itself, then I'd recommend against patching the header and instead fix the build system (we add `-Wno-system-headers` elsewhere to work around this).
